title: Google Login
description: Add Google OAuth 2.0 login to the task management app so users can sign in faster without creating a separate password. After successful Google login, user should be redirected to the main dashboard.
target_user: End user (existing and new users of the task management app)
business_goal: Reduce login friction and increase user retention by offering social login option
constraints: Must not break existing email/password login flow
Must support login failure and network error states
Must redirect to dashboard after successful login
Must handle Google account not linked to existing app account
Mock data is allowed for Google OAuth token in demo
